Text.Page:
We're here to blockade this entrance and keep those gulas inside...and away from us. But they keep growing their numbers!

We were supposed to get reinforcements from {@Rgn:62001$$Cutthroat Harbor}, but I've seen no sign they're anything but a fantasy.

Would you go see {@LinkCreature:62#1007$$Kasib} in {@Rgn:62001$$Cutthroat Harbor} and see when they should arrive? We can't hold these brutes off alone much longer.

I know—I know! Things are crazy out there. Things are crazy everywhere. The world's gone mad. I get it.

But that doesn't mean I can just create more soldiers out of thin air. Tell {@LinkCreature:209#1007$$Raviv} that I'm sorry, but I don't know when we'll be able to get reinforcements out there.

I know it's hard, but they have to keep holding {@Rgn:9011$$Relic Hunter Outpost}, no matter the cost.

He knows we can't do it alone, but wants us to do it anyway? Fantastic news.

Look, don't tell anyone around here what he said, yeah? I don't...I don't like lying to my soldiers, but if they know nobody's coming, we'll lose our hold here for sure.

Thanks for making the trip.
